name: Montgomery Police Department - Headquarters
description: MPD serves the city with approximately 500 sworn officers. Operates 4 precincts covering all areas of Montgomery. Community policing programs include Neighborhood Watch and DARE.

name: Montgomery Fire/Rescue Department
description: MFR operates 20 fire stations across the city with approximately 400 firefighters. Provides fire suppression, EMS, hazmat response, and technical rescue services.

name: Crime Statistics - 2025 Overview
description: Year-over-year crime trends show a 12% decrease in property crime and 8% decrease in violent crime in 2025. Focus areas include downtown, west Montgomery, and Atlanta Highway corridor.

name: SafetyNet Camera System
description: Network of over 200 surveillance cameras at key intersections and high-crime areas throughout Montgomery. Integrated with the Real Time Crime Center for rapid response.

name: Emergency Management Agency
description: Coordinates disaster preparedness, severe weather response, and emergency operations. Manages the Emergency Operations Center and CodeRED mass notification system.

name: Precinct Map & Response Times
description: Average emergency response time is 6.2 minutes citywide. Precinct 1 (North): 5.8 min, Precinct 2 (East): 6.0 min, Precinct 3 (West): 6.5 min, Precinct 4 (South): 6.4 min.
